creator: daniel.tihanyi@tetragir.com
text:
Hello,

it seems that that either the distfile was incorrectly created or the file upstream changed. Build fails as there is a size mismatch.

...
=> Attempting to fetch https://dl.grafana.com/oss/release/grafana-7.3.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz
fetch: https://dl.grafana.com/oss/release/grafana-7.3.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 53996284, actual 53996661
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/grafana-7.3.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/grafana-7.3.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
